themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Verse 16 introduces the plague of lice or gnats (כִּנִּם, kinnim), targeting Geb, earth god....". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶ֥רֶץ: of the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

themes.label: Worship
themes.summary: This chapter gives prominence to praise, worship, thanksgiving, or blessing God’s name. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "What happens when blessings become curses through misplaced worship?".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 1 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: What happens when blessings become curses through misplaced worship?

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 30 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to
